name: Jim Norton
bio: Jim Norton is an American stand-up comedian, radio personality, and author known for raw, self-deprecating material about his vices and personal failings. He gained wide exposure as the third mic on the radio shows Opie and Anthony and its successors on SiriusXM. He has released multiple comedy albums and specials, including Monster Rain, Please Be Offended, and the Netflix special Mouthful of Shame.

timeline.ev: Performs first stand-up routine in New Jersey
Joins Opie and Anthony as third mic
Releases Netflix special Mouthful of Shame

accolades: Author of New York Times-noted comedy books Happy Endings and I Hate Your Guts

bits.t: No One Cares About Flat Earthers
